text:
```json
{
  "type": "CODE_BUILDER",
  "title": "Interactive Coding: Understanding the CPU",
  "lessonText": "Let's simulate a simplified CPU fetch-decode-execute cycle using a coding exercise!",
  "data": {
    "codeBuilder": {
      "avatarInstruction": "Complete the code to simulate the CPU's fetch-decode-execute cycle. Use the options to fill in the blanks.",
      "lines": [
        {
          "content": "instruction = ___ # Fetch instruction",
          "correctValue": "memory[program_counter]",
          "options": [
            "program_counter++",
            "memory[program_counter]",
            "decode(instruction)",
            "execute(decoded_instruction)"
          ]
        },
        {
          "content": "decoded_instruction = decode(instruction) # ___ instruction",
          "correctValue": "Decode",
          "options": [
            "Fetch",
            "Decode",
            "Execute",
            "Store"
          ]
        },
        {
          "content": "execute(decoded_instruction) # ___ instruction",
          "correctValue": "Execute",
          "options": [
            "Fetch",
            "Decode",
            "Execute",
            "Store"
          ]
        },
        {
          "content": "program_counter += 1 # Move to the next ___",
          "correctValue": "instruction",
          "options": [
            "data",
            "instruction",
            "ALU",
            "Control Unit"
          ]
        }
      ],
      "options": [
        "memory[program_counter]",
        "decode(instruction)",
        "execute(decoded_instruction)",
        "program_counter++",
        "Fetch",
        "Decode",
        "Execute",
        "Store",
        "data",
        "instruction",
        "ALU",
        "Control Unit"
      ]
    }
  }
}
```
